issues.description: Card text shows 'DON!! −1' (cost payment mechanic), not a conditional trigger. Should use 'Always' condition, not 'HasRestingDon'. The DON!! payment is a cost, not a condition to check.
Target should allow 0–1 selection. Current DSL uses implicit single selection; should explicitly specify 'upTo':1 or equivalent to match 'up to 1' in card text.
